parents.subject: LU-16518 build: disable Clang warnings on GNU C extensions

commit.subject: LU-16518 llite: implicit truncation to a one-bit field
commit.message:
LU-16518 llite: implicit truncation to a one-bit field

Change the via_hybrid_switched one-bit field to unsigned int
to avoid an implicit truncation error reported by
Clang (-Wsingle-bit-bitfield-constant-conversion).

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: Iba92d69c35eda59bb96aa17ba0456adcf9750d0d
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63240
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
